commit_scope: Restore the public web and API deployment by pre-creating the four writable grounding-state bind targets required by the read-only API container root filesystem.

results: Hostinger deployment contract passed, including all four immutable image mountpoints
local Docker image build was unavailable because the desktop Docker daemon was not running; GitHub deployment performs the authoritative image build

test_flows: Hostinger deploy builds and starts API, web, and pulse

phase_gate.reason: Local contract passes; CI, merge, deployment, and public witness remain.
